title: Deleting Subitems Without Deleting Connections
excerpt: Can I delete a subitem without removing existing connections?  If I duplicate a subitem into another item, then subsequently want to delete that duplicate (copy), then it also deletes the original subitem I duplicated it…

posts.author: mjsteve (Michael Steve)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I delete a subitem without removing existing connections? If I duplicate a subitem into another item, then subsequently want to delete that duplicate (copy), then it also deletes the original subitem I duplicated it from. There should be an option to remove only the duplicated subitem without the connection.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mjsteve - by any chance is it possible for you to send over some screenshots or a screen-recording demonstrating this behaviour in action? I just want to be sure I am understanding the steps you’re taking leading up to this issue.

If you’re happy to send a recording please ensure it does not include your sensitive data You can use the online tool loom.com to record for free and then send over a link!
